title: [codereview-1] Zephyr parser regex still duplicates splitlines() loop and read_text() - should stream lines for memory efficiency on large hetero logs (P2 from previous)
description: The METRICS parser and main loop both call content.splitlines() after read_text(). Update to pass lines iterator to avoid multiple full parses. Also update other parse_*_logs for consistency per ein8. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-0k11
